ingushetia.name: Dulkh-khaltam
ingushetia.description: Boiled meat with dumplings and an aromatic garlic broth — the main festive dish.

ingushetia.name: Chapilgash
ingushetia.description: Thin flatbreads filled with curd or potato, fried and brushed with butter.

ingushetia.name: Hovla (halva)
ingushetia.description: National halva made of roasted flour, clarified butter and sugar syrup — a must-have treat at celebrations.

ingushetia.name: Berkh
ingushetia.description: A hearty flour porridge, an everyday highland staple.

chechnya.name: Zhizhig-galnash
chechnya.description: The signature Chechen dish: meat, dumplings and a sharp garlic sauce called beram.

chechnya.name: Chepalgash
chechnya.description: Thin flatbreads with curd and herbs, generously brushed with melted butter.

chechnya.name: Hingalsh
chechnya.description: Sweet flatbreads filled with pumpkin — a traditional homemade pastry.

chechnya.name: Akhar-khaltam
chechnya.description: Corn dumplings with cheese and curd, served hot with broth.

dagestan.name: Khinkal
dagestan.description: Not to be confused with khinkali: pieces of dough with meat, broth and garlic sauce. Each people has its own version.

dagestan.name: Chudu
dagestan.description: Thin pies with meat, curd, herbs or pumpkin, dry-fried in a pan.

dagestan.name: Kurze
dagestan.description: Dagestani "dumplings" with meat, egg or curd, sealed with a braided edge.

dagestan.name: Urbech
dagestan.description: A paste of ground flax or apricot kernels with honey and butter.

kabardino-balkaria.name: Khychyns
kabardino-balkaria.description: Thin flatbreads with cheese, potato or meat — the main dish of the Balkar table.

kabardino-balkaria.name: Lyagur
kabardino-balkaria.description: Dried meat prepared for storage; the base of hearty highland dishes.

kabardino-balkaria.name: Gedlibzhe
kabardino-balkaria.description: Kabardian chicken in a tender sour-cream and garlic sauce.

kabardino-balkaria.name: Ayran
kabardino-balkaria.description: A fermented milk drink, an indispensable companion of the highland meal.

karachay-cherkessia.name: Khychyns
karachay-cherkessia.description: Karachay khychyns with potato and cheese — a reason to gather the whole family.

karachay-cherkessia.name: Sohta
karachay-cherkessia.description: Homemade sausage of liver and tail fat with spices.

karachay-cherkessia.name: Shorpa
karachay-cherkessia.description: A rich lamb soup with vegetables and herbs.

karachay-cherkessia.name: Lokums
karachay-cherkessia.description: Fluffy fried doughnuts of yeast dough served with tea and ayran.

north-ossetia.name: Ossetian pies
north-ossetia.description: Ualibakh with cheese, kartofdzhyn with potato, tsakharadzhyn with beet leaves. Three pies are a sign of respect.

north-ossetia.name: Dzykka
north-ossetia.description: A thick porridge of fresh cheese and cornmeal cooked in clarified butter.

north-ossetia.name: Lyvzha
north-ossetia.description: Stewed chicken or lamb in a spicy sauce with garlic and seasonings.

north-ossetia.name: Tsakhdon
north-ossetia.description: A spicy sauce of sour cream, garlic and adjika — served with meat and pies.
